description_long: This vending machine features a sturdy rectangular frame with a wood-paneled exterior and metallic trim, giving it a rustic yet modern appearance. The front face displays a transparent window revealing neatly arranged bottles, likely containing various elixirs or beverages, and a vertical row of colorful selection buttons to the right. Above the window, a prominent illuminated sign reads 'Exotic Elixirs' in a stylized script, adding a distinctive branding element. A small digital or printed display panel and a payment interface are located to the right of the product window, facilitating user interaction. The sides and back are solid wood panels framed in metal, with minimal detailing except for a small access panel on one side. The overall construction suggests durability and a design intended to attract attention in urban environments.
description: A wood-paneled vending machine with a glass display window, colorful selection buttons, and a prominent 'Exotic Elixirs' sign. The design combines rustic wood and metal with modern vending features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass product window, selection buttons, payment interface, display panel, and the 'Exotic Elixirs' sign.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the wood and metal paneling, with a small access panel visible near the middle.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid wood-paneled back framed in metal, with no interactive features.
description_view_3: Right side view with uninterrupted wood and metal paneling, no visible access points or features.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular display panel is located on the upper right front, adjacent to the selection buttons, with a dark background and light text or digital readout.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present below the display panel on the right front, featuring a slot likely for coins or cards, with a metallic finish.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical row of individual, rectangular, multicolored buttons is located to the right of the product window, each likely corresponding to a different product.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A horizontal slot is located below the glass product window, integrated into the wood panel, with a subtle handle or flap for retrieving purchased items.
attribute_branding_or_signage: A large illuminated sign on top of the machine displays the text 'Exotic Elixirs' in white script on a wood background.
